data.title: Broadcom 'Well Positioned' As Analysts Predict Continued AI Revenue Growth
data.description: AVGO analysts highlight AI growth, recovery of non-AI segments, and new XPU customers. Expect continued strength in AI semiconductor revenue.

data.title: National Institutes Of Health Terminates Some Research Grants Amid Political And Policy Shift
data.description: The NIH is terminating research grants tied to DEI, transgender studies, and climate change, citing policy shifts. Experts warn of legal concerns and scientific censorship.
